problem id: 28ffe70d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) OR SHL(2)

examples:
  11101010 -> 10101110
  10100111 -> 11111110
  00110100 -> 11010011
  11010101 -> 01011101
  10011111 -> 11111101
  10001011 -> 10111100
  00111111 -> 11111111
  10100000 -> 10001010
  01100001 -> 10010110
  01001100 -> 11110100

query: 00111010
predicted answer: 11101011
